indicators.name: counter
indicators.rationale: The counter obstructs the open floor space required for yoga.

indicators.name: floor
indicators.rationale: The floor is obstructed by the counter and cabinets, preventing any open space for yoga.

indicators.name: cabinets
indicators.rationale: The cabinets obstruct the open floor space required for yoga.

indicators.name: bowl
indicators.rationale: The bowls on the counter are not suitable for yoga practice.

reasoning_summary: This kitchen scene is poorly suited for yoga due to the presence of a counter and cabinets that obstruct the open floor space required for yoga. The bowls on the counter also make it unsuitable for yoga practice. A score of 2 rather than 1 reflects the presence of some open space, but the obstruction is too significant to allow for yoga.
